patterns_recognized: Negative-edge GOLD rule now 3/3 validated through 05-11 (CHC@TEX -4.41pp, NYY@MIL -2.00pp, NYY@BAL -4.75pp all lost); edge_pp < 0 on GOLD = automatic DOWNGRADE regardless of F-signal count.

PLATINUM calibration artifact: model_prob > 0.85 + f5_full_delta > 0.20 failed 2/2 (ATL@LAD 05-10, SF@LAD 05-11 SF won 9-3 at model_prob 0.9447); today's LAD PLATINUM at 0.8698 with delta=0.2228 triggers DOWNGRADE.

SEA@HOU F3/override pattern: F3~1796 + fair_prob < 0.42 + stacked pipeline flags appeared identically on 05-11 (OVERRIDE validated, SEA won 3-1 behind Kirby) and recurs today; pattern strongly supports OVERRIDE to SEA even with Bryan Woo (not Kirby) pitching.
Three-signal GOLD CONFIRM bar (F3 > 500 AND edge > 4pp AND f5_full_delta < 0.15 AND no stacked flags) went 2-for-2 on 05-11 (TB@TOR 8-5, ARI@TEX 1-0); WSH@CIN cleanly meets all four criteria today.
Stacked pipeline flags (acute_roster + confidence_downgrade) remain reliable DOWNGRADE signals — validated on DET@KC 05-09, NYY@BAL 05-11, SEA@HOU 05-11 OVERRIDE.

LAA @ CLE.reasoning: Edge +0.96pp correctly excluded by [4,15]pp band filter. CLE (22-21) hosts LAA (16-26); Slade Cecconi vs Walbert Ureña — directional read is sound but no staking signal. f5/full gap=0.024 with both stages aligned for CLE. bullpen_fatigue=True and confidence_downgrade=True warrant caution but SKIP tier already handles this. No override thesis.

NYY @ BAL.reasoning: Hard DOWNGRADE: edge_pp=-2.71pp (negative). Market prices NYY at 57.8% — significantly MORE bullish than model's 55.1%. When market is more confident than model on the same side, market holds superior information. Pattern has failed 3/3 (CHC@TEX 05-09, NYY@MIL 05-09, NYY@BAL 05-11). Stacked bullpen_fatigue + confidence_downgrade adds further concern. Will Warren vs Trevor Rogers is competitive.

WSH @ CIN.reasoning: Three-signal GOLD bar cleanly met: F3=1046.4 (>500), edge=+10.44pp (>4pp, within band), f5_full_delta=0.091 (<15pp). No stacked flags; confidence_downgrade=False. Miles Mikolas (WSH) vs Brady Singer (CIN) — CIN edges F5 at 56.6% but WSH's lineup quality advantage (F3=1046) drives the full-game edge at +10.44pp. Bar validated 2-for-2 on 05-11; WSH@CIN is the clearest application today.

COL @ PIT.reasoning: Paul Skenes confirmed pitching for PIT (API id=694973). Model picks COL at 51.7% vs market's fair_prob=0.2336 for COL — the lowest on the slate, and the market's largest single-game disagreement. Stage 1/2 gap=0.2113: Skenes dominates F5 at 69.4%, then model inexplicably gives COL the full game. COL is 16-25 facing an elite Cy Young-caliber SP at PNC Park. Edge +28.36pp is a model artifact, not a genuine edge. OVERRIDE to PIT direction; SKIP tier maintained given fair_prob data quality.

TB @ TOR.reasoning: Three-signal bar fails: edge=+0.99pp is below the 4pp minimum threshold. Shane McClanahan (TB, elite) vs Patrick Corbin (TOR, declining veteran) is a quality mismatch, but the model's small edge (+0.99pp) indicates the market has already fully priced McClanahan's advantage. With confidence_downgrade=True and edge failing the four-point floor validated on 05-11, DOWNGRADE is correct. Market has already captured the SP edge.

DET @ NYM.reasoning: OVERRIDE to NYM: Freddy Peralta confirmed pitching (API id=642547). f5_full_delta=0.3285 is the largest on the slate — NYM wins F5 at 80.9% with Peralta, yet model picks DET for full game. Three stacked flags (acute_roster + bullpen_fatigue + confidence_downgrade). Market has NYM at 58.7% vs model's DET at 51.9%. DET's late-game comeback thesis vs Peralta + NYM bullpen is not credible given the flags and extreme Stage 1/2 gap.

CHC @ ATL.reasoning: Stacked flags rule: acute_roster=True + confidence_downgrade=True. ATL lineup (API) includes Dominic Smith at DH and Mike Yastrzemski in RF — non-standard configurations consistent with acute_roster concern. CHC is 27-14 (best record on the slate), making Colin Rea a dangerous matchup even at 63% model confidence. Market prices ATL at 53.1% vs model's 63.2% — a 10pp disagreement the market may know through lineup news. Stacked-flags DOWNGRADE validated on DET@KC 05-09 and SEA@HOU 05-11.

KC @ CHW.reasoning: Stephen Kolek confirmed via API (KC SP, id=663568) with 0 Statcast pitches season-to-date — PENDING designation is correct. CHW SP is Erick Fedde (established MLB veteran). Without Kolek's SP quality score, no reliable directional basis exists. Consistent with PENDING protocol validated on DET@KC 05-10 and NYY@MIL 05-10.

MIA @ MIN.reasoning: Stage 1/2 gap=0.2118 exceeds 0.15 threshold — MIN wins F5 at 64.7% (Bailey Ober) but MIA picked for full game requiring a late-inning reversal. Eury Pérez pitches for MIA with raw talent but limited MLB starts history (potential thin-data concern). No stress flags and confidence_downgrade=False are mildly positive, but the large Stage 1/2 gap alone justifies SKIP. SKIP tier correctly applied.

SD @ MIL.reasoning: MIL full-game pick (60.8%) depends on late-inning bullpen advantage over SD's Bradgley Rodriguez early. That bullpen-carry thesis is directly undermined by bullpen_fatigue=True + confidence_downgrade=True — the very mechanism MIL needs to win is flagged as unreliable. Sproat vs Rodriguez is competitive in F5. SKIP tier appropriately handles this.

ARI @ TEX.reasoning: f5_full_delta=0.1844 exceeds 0.15 Stage 1/2 threshold — TEX wins F5 at 64.1% (MacKenzie Gore) but ARI (Zac Gallen) is picked for full game requiring a comeback. No active F-signals; signals column empty. Gallen vs Gore is a legitimate matchup but without confirming signals the direction is near-random. ARI 20-20, TEX 19-22 — moderate quality both sides. SKIP correctly applied.

SEA @ HOU.reasoning: OVERRIDE to SEA: near-identical structure to 05-11 validated OVERRIDE (F3=1796 vs 1783.5, fair_prob=0.376 vs 0.418, acute_roster+confidence_downgrade stacked, edge +27.44pp outside band). SEA SP Bryan Woo (quality, ~3.5 ERA) vs HOU's Tatsuya Imai (high API id 837227, likely new pitcher with thin Statcast history). Market gives SEA 62.4% implied (fair_prob=0.376). HOU is 16-26 and struggling. George Kirby shut HOU down 3-1 yesterday on same model structure; Bryan Woo is a credible threat at the same tier.

STL @ OAK.reasoning: fair_prob=0.4015 below 0.42 floor; f5_full_delta=0.1794 exceeds 0.15 Stage 1/2 threshold. OAK dominates F5 at 67.5% (Jeffrey Springs) but STL near-coin-flip at 50.5% full game. No active F-signals. Andre Pallante vs Jeffrey Springs. Near-50/50 model output with data quality flags makes this correctly SKIP. STL 23-17, Athletics 21-19.

SF @ LAD.reasoning: DOWNGRADE per near-hard-rule: PLATINUM + f5_full_delta=0.2228 (>0.20) + model_prob=0.8698 (outside reliable [0.48,0.72] range). F3=9589.3 is almost certainly a pipeline data artifact — no legitimate baseball context produces a swing-take gap 5x higher than prior extremes (~1800). F1_xera_gap* flagged small-sample. SF beat LAD 9-3 yesterday at model_prob 0.9447. LAD direction defensible with Yamamoto pitching (elite SP confirmed), but model_prob inflation warrants SKIP; keeping LAD as directional pick.

PHI @ BOS.reasoning: PENDING at pipeline runtime (BOS SP unannounced). API NOW CONFIRMS: PHI SP=Zack Wheeler (elite, id=554430), BOS SP=Jovani Morán (reliever spot-starting, id=663558). Wheeler vs Morán is a massive SP quality mismatch. PHI lineup (Turner, Schwarber, Harper, García, Realmuto) is excellent; BOS 17-23 at home. Claude directional view: PHI clearly favored. Pending Statcast threshold validation — next pipeline run should score this matchup fully. Not counted in today's graded picks.
